query:
-- Overall contact enrichment summary
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinUrl IS NOT NULL AND linkedinUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasLinkedin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasPhone
FROM projectContacts;
